title: Accordion CDK
description: The Accordion CDK provides a set of directives for creating collapsible content sections with smooth animations. It consists of several directives that work together to create expandable/collapsible content areas, supporting both individual collapsible sections and accordion-style behavior where only one section can be open at a time.

sections.title: Usage
sections.description: A simple example of using the axCarousel directive

sections.title: Accordion mode
sections.description: With accordion, you can only have one section open at a time.

sections.title: Without toggle button
sections.description: Without axAccordionCloseButton, you can click on the header to control the collapse state.

sections.title: Features
sections.description: The accordion CDK provides several key features for creating collapsible content sections:

props.name: accordion
props.description: Enable accordion mode where only one section can be open at a time. When true, opening one section will automatically close others.

props.name: activeIndex
props.description: The index or array of indices of active accordion items. Can be a single number, array of numbers, or null for no active items.

props.name: isCollapsed
props.description: Controls the collapsed state of the accordion item. When true, the content is hidden; when false, the content is visible.

props.name: collapsedOnItemClick
props.description: Whether to automatically toggle the collapse state when the item header or close button is clicked.

events.name: onClick
events.description: Emitted when the accordion item header or close button is clicked. Provides the component instance in the event payload.

props.name: transition
props.description: Duration of the transition animation in milliseconds. Controls both height and opacity transitions.
